parameters-en.Shape: Controls the shape of the main oscillator used for the AM (Amplitude Modulation) carrier. The oscillator is a sine wave at 0.0, a triangle wave at 5.0, and a square wave at 10.0.
parameters-en.DutyCycle: Alters the oscillator wave shape in differing ways. For example, when Shape is a triangle wave (5.0), 50% is a normal triangle wave and extreme values warp the wave toward a saw down (0%) or saw up (100%) shape. Or when Shape is a square wave (10.0), 50% is symmetrical and extreme values result in a wave shape that's mostly low (0%) or mostly high (100%).
parameters-en.Octave: The frequency of the AM (Amplitude Modulation) carrier follows the pitch of the input signal. Octave shifts the AM carrier in relation to the input signal by up to 3 octaves up or down.
parameters-en.Pitch: The frequency of the AM (Amplitude Modulation) carrier follows the pitch of the input signal. Pitch shifts the AM (Amplitude Modulation) carrier in relation to the input signal by up to 12.0 semitones up or down.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (or high pass) filter to the ring modulation, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the ring modulation, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.FM Amount: Controls the amount of the FM (Frequency Modulation) modulator applied to the AM carrier. At 0.0, only the AM carrier is applied; at 10.0 the AM carrier is fully modulated by the FM modulator.
parameters-en.FM Shape: Controls the shape of the oscillator used for FM of the AM carrier. The oscillator is a sine wave at 0.0, a triangle wave at 5.0, and a square wave at 10.0.
parameters-en.FM Duty: Alters the FM oscillator wave shape. 50% is symmetrical and extreme values result in a wave shape that's mostly low (0%) or mostly high (100%).
parameters-en.FM Octave: The frequency of the FM carrier follows the pitch of the input signal. FM Octave shifts the FM carrier in relation to the input signal by up to 3 octaves up or down.
parameters-en.FM Pitch: The frequency of the FM carrier follows the pitch of the input signal. FM Pitch shifts the FM carrier in relation to the input signal by up to 12.0 semitones up or down.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the ring modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
